name: Spiced Potpourri for the Holidays
recipeIngredient: 8 oz decorated jelly jars with bands and lids
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a vegetable peeler, carefully peel the fruit, removing only the outer layer of peel, not any of the white pith.
2. Cut or tear the peels into one-inch pieces.
3. Line a pan with paper towels.
4. Place the peels in a preheated oven set to 175°F (or on the warm setting) and dry for 1.5 hours, tossing occasionally until leathery and slightly crunchy.
5. Spread the dried peels on dry paper towels and let air dry for an additional 24 hours.
6. Combine the dried peels with the remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
7. Fill each jelly jar half pint jars with the mixture, place lids on top, and screw bands tightly onto the jars.
8. To use: Remove the lid and leave the band on for decoration to fragrance a room. Alternatively, put one tablespoon of the mixture into a jar and fill it with boiling water to release the fragrance.
